untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern recognition requires chart pattern detection (identification of two peaks at equal heights, valley formation, and neckline) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The signal also references AEDT (not in allowed indicators) and requires visual pattern confirmation that would need specialized pattern recognition logic beyond the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: This is a visual chart pattern that cannot be reliably translated into mechanical indicator rules. A proper implementation would require: (1) peak/trough detection algorithm, (2) peak height comparison logic, (3) neckline identification, (4) breakout confirmation below neckline. The 65% failure rate in bull markets is documented but cannot be operationalized without pattern detection. Placeholder conditions use pivot point as a crude approximation of neckline support, but this is insufficient for true double-top identification.
